## Operator Notes

**Delivered:** PR [#411](https://github.com/chrislawcodes/hoard-hurt-help/pull/411),
squash-merged to `main` as `ae70137` on 2026-06-15. CI green (both jobs), pre-merge
smoke test passed (server boots, `/healthz` 200, `/me/agents/new` auth-gated).
(The runner's auto-recorded delivery shows "not recorded" because the PR was
created via `gh` after `deliver --create-pr` failed on a not-yet-pushed branch +
1-commit-behind main; recorded here instead.)

**What shipped:** Strategy-first onboarding — agent creation is decoupled from
having a connection. Four slices: (1) remove the create-agent gate on POST + GET;
(2) provider-scoped connect handoff (`?provider=` hint, target-aware live
short-circuit on page AND the 4s poll, hint on every CTA, all-provider mapping);
(3) reverse the Join hub to design-first; (4) agent readiness UI (explicit
needs-connecting state, status-aware so a PAUSED connection counts, provider-scoped
CTAs, batched list queries). Post-create redirect aligned to the status-aware
enabled check (consistent with the readiness badge).

**Validation:** `ruff` + `mypy` clean; `pytest` 1024 passed. No DB migration.

**Open / deferred:** none blocking. The "live now" nuance on the agent card is
deliberately deferred to the existing health badge (not a new claim). Real-client
end-to-end (a person connecting Claude Code and playing) is a manual check, not
covered by automated tests.

**Architecture docs:** `docs/platform/AGENT_LUDUM_ARCHITECTURE.md` updated during
the run (Notable shapes bullet + the agents_create subsystem note). No further
drift between plan and shipped code.
